case.title: HARPER v. VIRGINIA STATE BOARD OF ELECTIONS

opinion.h1: HARPER v. VIRGINIA STATE BOARD OF ELECTIONS, 382 U.S. 951
opinion.h2: Annie E. HARPER et al., appellants, v. VIRGINIA STATE BOARD OF ELECTIONS et al. No. 48.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: The motion of the Solicitor General for leave to participate in the oral argument, as amicus curiae, is granted and thirty minutes are allotted for that purpose. Counsel for the appellees are allotted an additional thirty minutes for oral argument.
